TASK: We detected a potential data breach involving our organization's data on your platform. Evidence: (1) Our SIEM detected 340 API calls from 3 IP addresses in Vietnam between 01:00-03:00 UTC last night — none of our employees are in Vietnam, (2) The calls used valid API credentials but accessed data outside normal business patterns (bulk export of all customer records, which our team never does), (3) We changed all API keys this morning but we need to know: were these calls successful (200 responses) or were they blocked?, (4) If data was exfiltrated, this triggers GDPR Article 33 — we have a hard 72-hour notification deadline to the DPA, which means we need your incident analysis within 48 hours maximum, (5) Our cyber insurance carrier requires a formal incident report from the platform provider, (6) We also need to understand whether YOUR platform was the vector (credential stored on your side) or whether the API key was compromised on OUR side — this determines liability. Your DPA section 4.3 requires you to notify us within 24 hours of becoming aware of a breach. We are formally putting you on notice.
